title: The Biggest Lie About Funded Trading Challenges
description: POV: You keep failing your funded challenge and you think you need a better strategy. The real reason might shock you. Watch till the end. #ICTTrading #FundedTrader #SmartMoneyConcepts
script: POV: You just failed another funded challenge. You're blaming your strategy. Fair value gaps. Order blocks. None of it is working. So you buy another course. Study more order blocks. More fair value gaps. You think more knowledge is the answer. Plot twist — your strategy isn't the problem. You're over-trading on news days. Thursday volume is killing your account. Not your setup. Discipline beats strategy every time. Stop trading the wrong sessions. Follow R2F Trading for daily funded trader tips.
